ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "year_nominated" INTEGER /* Year the officer was nominated */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "award_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the officer serves */,
  "police_force_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police force where the officer serves */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date the nomination was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the nomination */,
  "nominated_by" TEXT /* Name of the nominator */,
  "nominated_by_role" TEXT /* Role of the nominator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_award_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_category_id") REFERENCES award_categories ("award_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_police_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("police_force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("police_force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_categories" (
  "award_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award category */,
  "max_winners" INTEGER /* Maximum number of winners per category */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the award category */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the award category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_forces" (
  "police_force_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police force */,
  "police_force_name" TEXT /* Name of the police force */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the police force is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the police force */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the police force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("police_force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "police_force_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police force where the officer serves */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the officer joined the police force */,
  "date_promoted" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  "current_station" TEXT /* Current station of the officer */,
  "current_district" TEXT /* Current district of the officer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_police_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("police_force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("police_force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the judge (e.g., chair, member) */,
  "appointed_date" TEXT /* Date when the judge was appointed */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Current appointment status */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurors" (
  "juror_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each juror */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the juror */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the juror */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the juror (e.g., chair, member) */,
  "appointed_date" TEXT /* Date when the juror was appointed */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Current appointment status */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the juror */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("juror_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations_judges" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the judge in the nomination (e.g., chair, member) */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date when the judge was assigned to the nomination */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id", "judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations_jurors" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination */,
  "juror_id" INTEGER /* ID of the juror */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the juror in the nomination (e.g., chair, member) */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date when the juror was assigned to the nomination */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the nomination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id", "juror_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination */,
  "juror_id" INTEGER /* ID of the juror */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Vote cast by the juror (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  "vote_reason" TEXT /* Reason provided by the juror for the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_juror_id FOREIGN KEY ("juror_id") REFERENCES jurors ("juror_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winners" (
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winner */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination */,
  "award_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was presented */,
  "award_ceremony" TEXT /* Details about the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_award_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_category_id") REFERENCES award_categories ("award_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winners_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nomination_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the nomination was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the nomination at the time of the history entry */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nomination_history_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nomination_history_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, judge, juror) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
